headline: Healthcare Worker Violence Incidents Reach 3,200 in 2025
context: Attacks on healthcare workers in government facilities increased 28% in 2025 prompting calls for protective legislation.

cards.big: 3,200 violence incidents against healthcare workers recorded at government facilities in 2025
cards.sub: Physical assaults verbal threats and property damage all increased from 2024

cards.big: Only 12% of violence incidents result in police reports due to complex reporting procedures
cards.sub: Healthcare workers feel unsupported and underreporting masks the true scale of abuse

cards.big: Malaysia has no specific legislation protecting healthcare workers from workplace violence
cards.sub: General assault provisions require workers to pursue individual criminal complaints

cards.big: India's Epidemic Diseases Amendment Act 2020 created specific healthcare worker protection offenses
cards.sub: Dedicated legislation with enhanced penalties reduced hospital violence incidents 35%

cards.big: Healthcare workers who fear for their safety cannot provide the care patients deserve
Should Malaysia pass dedicated legislation with enhanced penalties for healthcare worker violence
